entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Discover mathematical concepts using manipulatives. Learn strategies and build agility through mental math. RightStart A Primary Skill Focus: Number Sense, Addition and Subtraction, Place Value

This topic is included in the following course(s): Mathematics: Grade 1

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: All students should take the placement test on the RightStart website (rightstartmath.com). Some students may be able to skip RightStart A.
